hero.heading:
Village Theatre,
Timeless Stories
hero.description: Bringing drama to the heart of Stonesfield since 1953. From Shakespeare to pantomime, we've been entertaining West Oxfordshire for over 70 years.

next_show.subtitle: Coming Soon
next_show.title: Mercy of Sisters
next_show.details: Late June 2026 · Stonesfield Village Hall, OX29 8HA

features_section.subtitle: Why We Do It
features_section.heading: More Than Just a Drama Group

features.title: 70+ Years of Theatre
features.description: Founded in 1953, we've produced everything from farce to Shakespeare, from pantomime to original drama — and we're still going strong.

features.title: Award-Winning
features.description: We've successfully entered local drama competitions, winning both junior and senior categories. Several of our young members have gone on to professional careers.

features.title: Everyone Welcome
features.description: Whether you want to act, direct, build sets, do lighting, or just help out — there's always room for new members. No experience needed.

cta.heading: Get Involved
cta.description: We're always looking for new members — on stage and behind the scenes. Come and be part of our next production.
